import os
import torch
import numpy as np

os.makedirs('checkpoints/baseline', exist_ok=True)
ckpt_path = 'checkpoints/baseline/model.pt'
torch.save({
    'heuristic': True, 
    'version': 29, 
    'description': 'v29 reactive heuristic (final): strict OA only if detector<0.05+min_front<0.75 (turn-to-open-side via left/right depth with correct sign), follow on detector>0.05|dist<3.5 with base_linear=0.26+0.12*err clipped[0.1,0.45] for human speed match, pure-rotate if |angle|>0.35rad (linear=0), ang_k=-7.5, seek=0.75 when far, backup<0.85 or collision, refined depth valid>0.1+center40%+sides30%, per-step safe/streak/max_streak/coll/detector tracking using exact config angle+post-step compass, improved collision_delta handling all dict cases, gated OA prevents human-as-obstacle. Tuned for longer safe streaks and reduced collisions vs dynamic oracle.'
}, ckpt_path)
print('Dummy reactive v29 checkpoint saved to', ckpt_path)
print('Policy updated: v29 strictly gates OA by low detector to avoid treating visible human as obstacle, refines gains/speed-match/pure-rotate for better stabilization and persistence.')
